languages.text: "Нунциус слуга Императора. Его служба окончена — даруй ему Милосердие Императора и увековечь в сервочерепе".
"Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Mercy and immortalise him in a servo-skull."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус слуга Императора. Его служба окончена — даруй ему Милосердие Императора и увековечь в сервочерепе".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."
"Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."
"Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

languages.text: «Nuncius es un siervo del Emperador. Su servicio ha concluido; otórguele la Paz del Emperador y la vida eterna como servocráneo».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius es un siervo del Emperador. Su servicio ha concluido; otórguele la Paz del Emperador y la vida eterna como servocráneo».

languages.text: “努恩修斯是帝皇的仆人。他的使命已经结束，赐予他帝皇安息，将他封入伺服头骨以获永生。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯是帝皇的仆人。他的使命已经结束，赐予他帝皇安息，将他封入伺服头骨以获永生。”

languages.text: « Nuncius est un serviteur de l'Imperium. Maintenant que son service est terminé, accordez-lui la paix de l'Empereur et immortalisez-le sous forme de servocrâne. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius est un serviteur de l'Imperium. Maintenant que son service est terminé, accordez-lui la paix de l'Empereur et immortalisez-le sous forme de servocrâne. »

languages.text: "Nuncius, İmparator'un hizmetkârıdır. Vazifesi sona erdi. Ona İmparator'un Huzuru'nu bahşet ve bir hizmelette ölümsüz kıl."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, İmparator'un hizmetkârıdır. Vazifesi sona erdi. Ona İmparator'un Huzuru'nu bahşet ve bir hizmelette ölümsüz kıl."

languages.text: "Nuncius ist ein Diener des Imperators. Sein Dienst ist vorbei ... gewährt ihm den Frieden des Gottimperators und macht ihn in einem Servoschädel unsterblich."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ist ein Diener des Imperators. Sein Dienst ist vorbei ... gewährt ihm den Frieden des Gottimperators und macht ihn in einem Servoschädel unsterblich."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスは皇帝の僕だ。彼の務めは終わった――彼に皇帝の安息を与え、サーヴォスカルとして不滅のものとせよ」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is a servant of the Emperor. His service is over — grant him the Emperor's Peace and immortalise him in a servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスは皇帝の僕だ。彼の務めは終わった――彼に皇帝の安息を与え、サーヴォスカルとして不滅のものとせよ」
